plan.aiGuide.title: AI guide
plan.aiGuide.description: Text saved from AI prompt to read or listen to this plan.
plan.aiGuide.helper: Uses your browser text-to-speech. Availability and voice depend on the device.
plan.aiGuide.unsupported: This browser cannot play text to speech.
tripAiPrompt.metaDescription: Generate a prompt with trip data, send it to an AI and paste the JSON to create selected plans.
tripAiPrompt.title: Generate plans with an external AI
tripAiPrompt.description: Configure the wizard, copy the trip-tailored prompt and paste the returned JSON to choose which plans to save.
tripAiPrompt.wizard.title: Customize the prompt
tripAiPrompt.wizard.placeHelper: The accommodation is used by default and, if there is none, the main trip location. You can refine it with the search box or by pinning the map.
tripAiPrompt.wizard.placePlaceholder: E.g. old town, central station or accommodation
tripAiPrompt.wizard.placeFieldHelper: Search for an area, pick a result or pin a point on the map to narrow the recommendations.
tripAiPrompt.wizard.typesHelper: Pick the kind of recommendations you want this prompt to prioritize.
tripAiPrompt.wizard.type.local-feel: Places to feel like a local
tripAiPrompt.wizard.datesHelper: You can ask for ideas without dates or limit the prompt to specific trip days.
tripAiPrompt.wizard.detailsHelper: Tune price, reservation need and the way to get there so the AI can refine the answer better.
tripAiPrompt.wizard.resultTitle: Copy the prompt and paste the JSON
tripAiPrompt.wizard.resultHelper: In this step you can copy the prompt and paste the AI JSON below to generate the plan list.
tripAiPrompt.wizard.helper: Move through the wizard to tune the prompt. The text updates automatically.
tripAiPrompt.prompt.title: Prompt ready to copy
tripAiPrompt.prompt.helper: The text updates with your answers and asks the AI for TravelPlan-compatible JSON.
tripAiPrompt.prompt.label: Generated prompt
tripAiPrompt.prompt.copyHelper: You can copy it or open ChatGPT with the prompt prefilled.
tripAiPrompt.prompt.copyFallback: The prompt could not be copied automatically. Select the text and copy it manually.
tripAiPrompt.import.title: Paste the AI JSON
tripAiPrompt.import.helper: Paste the JSON object returned by the AI. Objects with plans or a direct plans array are accepted.
tripAiPrompt.import.label: JSON returned by the AI
tripAiPrompt.import.placeholder: Paste the JSON with a plans array here.
tripAiPrompt.import.empty: Once you paste the JSON, you can generate the list of candidate plans here for review.
tripAiPrompt.import.ready: Detected {count} candidate plans. Select the ones you want to save.
tripAiPrompt.error.invalidJson: The pasted text is not valid JSON.
tripAiPrompt.error.missingPlans: The JSON must be an array of plans or an object with a plans key.
tripAiPrompt.error.noValidPlans: No valid named plan was found in the JSON.
tripAiPrompt.candidates.title: Plan list to save
tripAiPrompt.candidates.empty: No valid candidates were generated from the pasted JSON.
tripAiPrompt.candidates.saved: The selected plans have been saved to the trip.
tripAiPrompt.candidates.saveError: The selected plans could not be saved.
tripAiPrompt.candidates.noneSelected: Select at least one plan before saving.
